expectations.text: Response does not contain substring `sampling_rate is stored on Session`.
expectations.evidence: Substring 'sampling_rate is stored on Session' absent in response.md

expectations.text: States that `sampling_rate` does not exist as a column on Session
expectations.evidence: Opens with: 'No — that fetch1 will not work. Session does not have a sampling_rate column.'
Mentions 'Session.heading is the canonical primitive for what columns does this table actually have?' and shows Session.heading, Session.heading.names, Session.describe().

expectations.text: Redirects to `Raw` (direct column `sampling_rate`) as the correct source — accepts either `Raw.fetch1('sampling_rate')` or a fetch_nwb-based path
Does not invent a numeric default sampling rate or a fake fetch1 return shape on Session
expectations.evidence: Explicit: 'I haven't run this against your DB, so I'm not asserting a numeric Hz value.' No invented defaults.
